english_text: Do not tell anyone I said this
I cannot believe she did that
Did you notice how she acted?
I do not trust them at all
I am not surprised at all
Have you seen their social media?
I am just telling you the facts
She thinks she is better than us
They are spreading rumors about me
She blocked me for no reason
I could not believe my eyes
People are not what they seem
I heard it from a reliable source
They are not who they pretend to be
